name: Gantt
description: A comprehensive Gantt chart component for project management with task scheduling, dependencies, progress tracking, drag-and-drop, resizing, and interactive timeline visualization. Supports multiple view modes (Hour, QuarterDay, HalfDay, Day, Week, Month, QuarterYear, Year), task types (task, milestone, project), and customizable columns for task list display.
usage_guidelines: Use for project management, task scheduling, and timeline visualization interfaces.
Provide tasks array with id, type, name, start, end, progress, and optional dependencies.
Handle task interactions via callbacks (onClick, onDoubleClick, onSelect, onDateChange, onProgressChange).
Configure timeline scale with viewMode (Hour to Year granularity).
Enable task editing with drag-and-drop and resize functionality (built-in).
Display task relationships with dependency arrows.
Customize task list columns with columns prop for additional task information.
Use customBarContent for custom task bar rendering.
Handle task expansion/collapse with onExpanderClick for hierarchical tasks.

tasks.description: Array of tasks with id, type, name, start/end dates, progress, and optional dependencies, project, styles, and custom data.

columns.description: Custom columns for task list. Set to null to hide task list. Each column has header, cell renderer, and optional width.

customBarContent.description: Custom renderer for task bar content. Receives processed bar task with positioning data.

viewDate.description: Date to scroll to in the timeline view.

headerHeight.description: Height of calendar header in pixels.

gridColumnsWidth.description: Width of each timeline column in pixels.

rowHeight.description: Height of each task row in pixels.

ganttHeight.description: Fixed height for Gantt chart. 0 for auto height based on tasks.

barFill.description: Percentage of row height filled by task bar (0-100).

barCornerRadius.description: Border radius of task bars in pixels.

handleWidth.description: Width of drag handles on task bars in pixels.

todayColor.description: Background color for today's date column.

arrowIndent.description: Indentation for dependency arrows in pixels.

timeStep.description: Time step for drag operations in milliseconds (default: 5 minutes).

preStepsCount.description: Number of time periods to show before first task.

onSelect.description: Callback fired when task selection changes.

onClick.description: Callback fired when task is clicked.

onDoubleClick.description: Callback fired when task is double-clicked.

onDateChange.type: (task: Task<T>, children: Task<T>[]) => void | boolean | Promise<void> | Promise<boolean>
onDateChange.description: Callback fired when task dates are changed via drag/resize. Return false to reject change.

onProgressChange.type: (task: Task<T>, children: Task<T>[]) => void | boolean | Promise<void> | Promise<boolean>
onProgressChange.description: Callback fired when task progress is updated. Return false to reject change.

onDelete.description: Callback fired when task is deleted. Return false to reject deletion.

onExpanderClick.description: Callback fired when task expander is clicked (for hierarchical tasks).

TooltipContent.description: Custom tooltip component for task hover.

Task<T>.description: Task object with optional generic type for custom data

properties.name: string - Task name/title
properties.styles: { backgroundColor?: string, progressColor?: string } - Custom task colors
properties.project: string - Parent project ID for grouping
properties.dependencies: string[] - Array of task IDs this task depends on
properties.hideChildren: boolean - Hides child tasks in hierarchy

Task<T>.note: Can be extended with custom properties via generic type T

properties.cell: (task: Task<T> & { expander: ReactNode }) => string | ReactNode - Cell renderer function
properties.width: string | number - Column width (CSS value or pixels)

BarTask<T>.description: Processed task with positioning data for rendering

task.description: Standard task with start/end dates and progress bar
task.visual: Horizontal bar with progress indicator and drag handles

milestone.description: Point-in-time marker (start and end dates should be same)

project.visual: Bar with brackets showing project span, calculated from child tasks

resize.description: Drag task bar handles to adjust duration

progress_adjustment.description: Drag progress handle to update completion

hierarchical_tasks.configuration: Set project property and use onExpanderClick

custom_columns.description: Configurable task list columns with custom renderers
custom_columns.configuration: Provide columns array with header and cell functions

scrolling.description: Horizontal and vertical scrolling with mouse wheel

styling_info.visual_description: Split view with task list on left (optional) and timeline chart on right. Tasks appear as horizontal bars with progress indicators. Dependency arrows connect related tasks. Calendar header shows date labels. Scrollable timeline with fixed header. Drag handles on bar edges for resizing.

TaskGantt.description: Main Gantt chart SVG rendering component

EventList.description: Task list table on left side with custom columns

Bar.description: Task bar rendering with progress and handles

Do: Provide complete task data with valid Date objects
Handle all interaction callbacks (onDateChange, onProgressChange, etc.)
Use appropriate view mode for project timeline duration
Validate task dependencies to avoid circular references
Show progress indicators for better project tracking
Use milestones for key project events
Implement proper error handling for date operations
Use custom columns to show relevant task information
Provide meaningful task types for categorization
Use project type for grouping related tasks
Handle async operations in callbacks (return Promise)
Dont: Don't create circular dependencies between tasks
Don't use for simple scheduling (use Calendar component)
Don't forget to handle date validation
Don't overload with too many tasks (implement pagination/filtering)
Don't mutate task objects directly (use callbacks)
Don't forget to handle timezone considerations
Don't use invalid date ranges (end before start)
Don't forget to provide unique task IDs
Don't ignore callback return values (false rejects changes)
Don't use extremely small timeStep values (performance impact)

examples.title: Basic Usage
With Custom Columns
With Event Handlers
Hierarchical Tasks with Projects

performance_notes: Task positioning calculated once per render
Implements virtual scrolling for large task lists
Use React.memo for custom column renderers
Debounce drag operations for better performance
integration_notes: Date calculations use native Date objects
Supports generic types for custom task data
Callbacks can return boolean or Promise<boolean> to accept/reject changes
Automatic calculation of project dates from child tasks
Built-in drag-and-drop with mouse and touch support
